effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Flagship Dragon, Flagburg Dragon", choose one of your other rear-guards, and it gets "[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if it is the first battle of this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: To all who disturbs the order of the ocean, there will be no mercy even if you are dead.

nameEN: In Search of an Ideal Far Away
effectEN: Choose one of your units, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](VC/RC):When your other unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.".
flavorTextEN: Become strong. For my precious, irreplaceable thing.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Ascendance Assault", call this card to (RC).
[CONT](RC):If your vanguard is "Flagship Dragon, Flagburg Dragon" or "Ascendance Assault", this unit gets "Intercept", and [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: Roger that, moving to the designated spot posthaste.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):When you would move or swap rear-guards during your main phase, you can also move it within the same row.
[CONT](RC):Your units in front of this unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's effects.
flavorTextEN: The beautiful garden that you created. Replant it as your heart wishes.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other unit attacks, if it is the fifth battle of this turn, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This right here is the latest cutting edge weapon, called the "Electrified Treasured Spear"!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may put all cards from your bind zone into the drop. If you do, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each card put.
flavorTextEN: I've decided. I'll have you clear this accumulated grudge.

effectEN: [CONT](VC/RC):This unit cannot attack from the front row.
flavorTextEN: The time to relax and rest is also important.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one unit card from among them, call it to a back row (RC), and discard the rest. That called unit cannot be moved to another (RC) until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your rear-guards.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard attacks from the back row, COST  [[Rest] this unit], and the unit that attacked gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Watch your step.

effectEN: [CONT]:This card cannot be ridden, called or moved to the front row
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other rear-guard is placed, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I already know where to point the needle.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & bind this unit], choose a blitz order from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: I pray for good things to happen to you!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Leave it to me♪

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your drop and bind zone have a total of five or more order cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](Back Row RC):During the battle this unit attacked, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: An underwater attack can't be blocked by half-hearted strength.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [bind an order card from your drop], choose an order card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When your other rear-guard attacks, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Bind this unit], choose an order card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Betting one's life to meet the orders of the customer, is a paragon for chefs.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other rear-guard is placed, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: It already knows, where the needles are pointed at.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) during your opponent's turn, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, search your deck for up to one card with the same card name as this card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/156): Who was it that said it is over?
(D-PR/348): Where are you aiming, can't you see I'm over here?

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you played an order this turn, COST  [discard an order card from your hand], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: All living things are lively feed to them.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [bind an order card from your drop], choose an order card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: The wind blows. Resentment is conceived, as a companion to agony.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you have six units, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: It may be discouraging on your own, but if it's together......!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Flagship Dragon, Flagburg Dragon", choose one of your other rear-guards, and it gets "[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if it is the first battle of this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: To all who disturbs the order of the ocean, there will be no mercy even if you are dead.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Leave it to me♪

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding on "Bioroid Youth, Rorowa", call up to one Plant Token to your back row center (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: Even I don't know why I was buried......

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, you may call a Plant Token to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Retire two other rear-guards], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your drop and bind zone have a total of five or more order cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: An illogically beautiful voice will guide the listeners to madness.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When your other rear-guard attacks, until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: It gets faster as it jumps from tree to tree.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your grade 1 or less units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your back row grade 2 or greater units.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, you may call a Plant Token to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)
flavorTextEN: With all of your feelings♪ Let's grow a small bud~♪

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Retire two other rear-guards], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Entertain me, okay? If you do, I'll let you live for the time being♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your grade 1 or less units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll show you my hometown some day.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw a card, look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top of your deck or discard it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your back row grade 2 or greater units.
flavorTextEN: Peacefully raised while being surrounded by kindness.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Brilliant Tune, Rektina", you may call this card to (RC).
[CONT](RC): During the battle this unit boosted a vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Move the baton to the beat of your heart.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [Put a grade 2 or less card from your hand into your soul], and draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, you may call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Apparently, the places where the flower band visits yield greater harvests.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [put a grade 2 or less card from hand into soul], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Their wonderful performance is said to reach even the World Tree.

effectEN: [CONT](Back Row RC):All of your other rear-guards in the same column as this unit cannot be attacked by your opponent's rear-guard.
flavorTextEN: While my eyes still have light, you shall not lay even a finger upon my allies!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you have a vanguard with "Lianorn" in its card name, your opponent cannot intercept until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The lively timbre, catches on to you as to listen.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have three or more grade 1 or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you have another grade 1 or less rear-guard, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle. Then, if it boosted a grade 3 or greater vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: I want my performance to reach even more people!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 3 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC).
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have two or more back row grade 1 or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: In the Dark Night, The Resentment Freezes
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose a card from among them, discard it, and shuffle your deck. Choose a card with grade equal to or less than your vanguard from your drop, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have three or more grade 1 or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: The thirst for life is more steadfast than anything, and inviolable by anyone.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or greater rear-guards not being attacked, move it to (GC), and if it cannot be moved, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Even during the performance, fan service is not omitted.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from deck or hand, if you have a vanguard with "Sylvan Horned Beast" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Magnolia" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Magnolia" in its card name, your persona ride increases the [Power] of your back row units as well.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from deck or hand, if you have a vanguard with "Sylvan Horned Beast" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Magnolia" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Magnolia" in its card name, your persona ride increases the [Power] of your back row units as well.
flavorTextEN: Now is the moment for what blooms beyond yearning.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, you may call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Focus your vision without error on what you must pierce.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: We can't afford to stop here, right?

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: It's beautiful, right? When I control the light.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row Center RC):When your rear-guard attacks, if it is the first battle of this turn, that unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The first strike to start the battle, let's give it our best shot!

nameEN: In the Dim Darkness, The Frozen Resentment
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Look at the top three cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them, discard it, and shuffle your deck. Choose a card from your drop with grade less then or equal to your vanguard, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Do not walk outside on moonless nights. Your very soul will get stolen otherwise.

effectEN: [CONT](Back Row Center RC):During the fifth battle of this turn or more, the costs of all original [AUTO] abilities of your vanguard with "Flagburg" in its card name are reduced by Counter Blast (1).
flavorTextEN: Controlling the series of waves and executing justice.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When the attack this unit boosted hits, if you have a [Stand] vanguard with "Flagburg" in its card name, [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: The waves are fierce; aiming for further heights.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Retire two other rear-guards], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Entertain me, okay? If you do, I'll let you live for the time being♪

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 3 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC).
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have two or more back row grade 1 or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The transparent and pure love is brimming in each step.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) by your card's ability, if your vanguard is a [Glitter], choose one of your grade 1 or less rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Turn on the lights, so you wouldn't lose your way.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with "Rorowa" in its card name!
Choose up to one card from you drop with grade less than or equal to your vanguard, and call it to (RC). Then, if you have a rear-guard with "Radylina" in its card name, you may call a Plant token to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical]1 and have boost)
flavorTextEN: We're the new idols, Rorowa and Rady! Nice to meet you!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have three or more grade 1 or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I'm really nervous…...but if everyone is here…!

nameEN: Sweets That Become an Evil Dream
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw a card, look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top of your deck or discard it.
flavorTextEN: I'm a gourmet, you know? I'll eat them all though.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on a (RC) with your other grade 1 or less rear-guard, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: With the entrusted feelings in their hearts, the soldiers sharpen their swords.

effectEN:
[AUTO](Drop):When your grade 3 or greater vanguard is placed during the ride phase, if you persona rode this turn, and you do not have "Pink Moth Girl, Maple" on your (RC), you may call this card to (RC). If you called it, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[Glitter]-"Thegrea" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Thegrea" in its card name)
[AUTO](Back Row RC):When your unit in the same column as this unit [Stand], you may [Stand] this unit. If you do, at the end of that turn, retire this unit.
flavorTextEN: Heh heh! It's because I'm number one!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is rode upon by a unit with only <Aqua Force> for its clan, search your deck for up to one Blue Storm Armada card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Maelstrom" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: To not be bothered by pain nor sacrifice. That is their duty.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if you have a vanguard with "Maelstrom" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose two of your rear-guards, and swap their positions.
flavorTextEN: A strategy that has both evolved and deepened will overcome any storm.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the fourth battle of this turn or more on your turn, all of your units in the same column as this unit get [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other unit [Stand] by your card effect, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
